findings.description: PROP-018-sync-manifest.json authored covering all 9 deliverable sections from DIRECTIVE-20260505-002. Schema design defines monitor/sync-manifest.json with 9 entry fields (path, direction, owner_agent, classification, notes, added_at, added_by, recursive, supersedes/deprecation_at), 4 direction values (workspace_to_clone, clone_to_workspace, both, never), 9 classifications (data, ledger, summary, scratch, source, docs, flag, log, report), 10 validation rules. Includes 10 example entries spanning all 9 classifications. Migration plan is 11 steps with dependency graph and ordering rationale. Option C (integrity-side gap detector) folded in as monitor/scripts/lint-sync-manifest.js with 4-finding-kinds severity rubric. Relic strategy documents all 17 relic files from PROP-017's catalog with deprecation_at dates. Side effects addressed: dual-write Human Notes Rule (lean: keep as optional/recommended-for-urgent), build.js OWNERSHIP (lean: run-time load with static fallback), CLAUDE.md File Ownership Rules (lean: manual prose summary + integrity drift check). All 5 open design questions answered with options/decision/rationale/tradeoff. Verification pattern specified for future tinker FIXED/STILL_BROKEN check.

Directive lifecycle additive edit performed: status pending→completed, completed_at set to 2026-05-05T19:38Z, completed_by_run set to tinker-run-2026-05-05T19-30Z, prop_id_authored set to PROP-018. No other fields mutated.

DIRECTIVE-20260505-003 (medium priority — curmudgeon-fingerprint-compare-schema-mismatch) remains status:pending. Will be picked up by next tinker run as the highest-priority pending directive (since 002 is now completed and 003 is the only other pending one). Expected pickup: next dispatch ~2026-05-06.
